task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Honda Accord (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $28295.00 and wholesale is $22316.00. Product features: Mid-size sedan with 1.5L turbocharged engine and Honda Sensing suite. Reference: https://automobiles.honda.com/accord

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Honda Accord. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Honda Accord. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
